query: Use datocms-setup-wordpress-import to install the DatoCMS WordPress import plugin, add env placeholders, and scaffold a local helper.
Please run datocms-setup-wordpress-import in this repo. I want a lean one-shot WordPress onboarding flow into DatoCMS.
Invoke datocms-setup-wordpress-import and add a datocms:import:wordpress script that prefers WORDPRESS_JSON_API_URL when present.
Use datocms-setup-contentful-import to set up Contentful onboarding into DatoCMS.
How do I import a WordPress site into DatoCMS with the CLI?
Add a helper for autogenerating DatoCMS migrations from environment diffs.
